query:
SELECT 
  pb.id, pb.boxNumber, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, 
  pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight, pb.createdAt
FROM package_boxes pb
JOIN product_variants pv ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V033';
